RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/pgsql/crtbl_schema.bat
RuleSet.GenFile: @ECHO off REM REM @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssBatScriptLicense$ $parsePgSqlArgsBat$$validatePgSqlArgsBat$ $iterate SchemaTables( each invoke_CreateSecTableBat empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each invoke_CreateNonSecTableBat empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each maybe_CreateTableHBat )$
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch TableName Cluster invoke_CreateTableBat Tenant invoke_CreateTableBat SecApp invoke_CreateTableBat SecForm invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroup invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroupForm invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroupInclude invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroupMember invoke_CreateTableBat SecSession invoke_CreateTableBat SecUser invoke_CreateTableBat default empty$

$switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecApp empty SecForm empty SecGroup empty SecGroupForm empty SecGroupInclude empty SecGroupMember empty SecSession empty SecUser empty default invoke_CreateTableBat$

psql -h %pghost% -d %pgdb% -U %pguser% -a -e -f $dbadminfilename_CreateTable$ >>%logfilename% 2>&1 $iterate DispensedId16Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdg16TableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate DispensedId32Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdg32TableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate DispensedId64Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdg64TableBat each empty empty empty )$
